title: Add M2 save replay resume harness
summary: Extend focused save/replay diagnostics to the M2 work/logistics vertical slice without broad save compatibility or platform save UI.
acceptance: M2 interrupt save load resume matches uninterrupted replay for the same seed command stream and checkpoint ticks
Load validates versions owner handles integer lanes sorted records and scenario id before mutating target stores
Derived indexes WorkOffers path caches reservations and read models rebuild from owner state before resumed ticks
Diagnostics name seed scenario first divergent tick and artifact paths on failure
No platform save UI or broad public save compatibility promise is introduced

history.details: Created by WM-0032 M2 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Added focused M2 save/replay resume harness, m2-save-replay filter and m2-work-logistics replay diagnostics; required checks and pnpm quality pass.

changes_requested: High: tools/sim-replay-diagnostics-lib.mjs imports sim-core internal M2 modules directly instead of the public package entry point, violating AGENTS package-boundary rule and ADR-0007 public import gate; required checks rerun and passed otherwise.
Addressed review finding by exporting focused M2 save/replay helpers through sim-core public entry point and removing tool imports of internal M2 modules; required checks and pnpm quality pass.
verified: Previous package-boundary finding resolved: M2 diagnostics now import through packages/sim-core/src/index.ts; required WM-0040 checks and pnpm quality pass; no blocking findings.
Branch integration gate passed after reviewer verification: handoff validate, taskctl validate, git diff --check, pnpm quality.

objective: Make M2 save/load/replay deterministic and diagnosable before Worker parity and benchmark closeout.
forbiddenPaths: public save compatibility promise beyond the focused M2 harness
schema or codec dependency changes without architecture approval
benchmarkImpact: Records save size, rebuild time, resume hash checkpoints and divergence diagnostics for later benchmark comparison.
reviewRouting: Owner completes to reviewer; systems-architect must block any save-format or migration scope expansion.
rollbackModel: Revert focused M2 save/replay harness while preserving M1 save/replay behavior.
ownerGate: Rebuild derived indexes from owner state
Run every required check before taskctl complete

sparkEligibility.reason: Save/replay and migration-boundary work is explicitly outside Spark scope.

review.summary: Previous package-boundary finding resolved: M2 diagnostics now import through packages/sim-core/src/index.ts; required WM-0040 checks and pnpm quality pass; no blocking findings.

integration.summary: Branch integration gate passed after reviewer verification: handoff validate, taskctl validate, git diff --check, pnpm quality.
